roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT MOT FOR PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PC1001,83 FILED

/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION FOR PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION/MO GRTD/PCD:  COUNTS1, 2, 3 AND 4/CPSS/X: TERMS OF DIVERSION ARE AS FOLLOWS:/X: NO ARRESTS;MAINTAIN EMPLOYMENT; CHECK IN 2X A WEEK WITH PTD AND COMPLETE  THINKING FORA CHANGE  COURSE,/PROGPCD:03-24-22/CONTD:PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:POSITIVE REPORT/
/CAL:MOTION FOR CAREGIVER DIVERSION/X:PD IS APPEARING VIA ZOOM/X:DEFENDANT ARRIVED LATE/X:BENCH WARRANT WAS PREVIOUSLY ISSUED AND NOW SETASIDE/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:DEFENSE ADD-TO-CALENDAR TO MODIFY GPS MONITORING/DEF:APPEARS VIA ZOOM/X:VOLUNTEER ATTORNEY LEO FISSEL SPECIALLY APPEARS FOR THE DEFENSE,/CTORD:ON 05-15-21 UNTIL 05-16-21, THE DEFENDANT MAY GO TO SACRAMENTO FOR HIS GRANDMOTHER'S BIRTHDAY PARTY TO INTRODUCE HIS NEW BABY TO HIS EXTENDED FAMILY,HE MUST NOTIFY SF SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT 24 HOURS PRIOR  TO LEAVING AND WHENHE RETURNS/CONTD:TO JOIN CODEFENDANT MILLER 21003317/DOP/DEF:MAY APPEAR VIA ZOOM/

/CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/X: LEO FISSEL APPEARS ON THE BEHALF OF  BONNIE CHAN FROM THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE/NTW60/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT MAY GO TO MOUNTAIN HOUSE IN TRACY FOR 24 HOURS TO INTRODUCE HIS NEW BABY TO IT'SGRANDMOTHER,  HE MUST NOTIFY SF SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT 24 HOURS PRIOR TO LEAVING AND WHEN HE RETURNS/VD: 04-27-21/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/
/CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE AND CUSTODY STATUS/DAWT/CONTD: 04-20-21 PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE, CUSTODY STATUS AND RELEASE CONDITIONS/DOP/CONTD: 04-27-21 PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 1 HOUR/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:LEO FISSEL, VOLUNTEER ATTORNEY WITH THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE, ALSO APPEARING/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX:05-12-21 (30TH)/X:60TH DAY IS 06-01-21/987,2/ORMS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SDEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE, CUSTODY STATUS RELEASE CONDITIONS ON 04-06-21/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 04-27-21/TE:1 HOUR/DOP/X:AT BOTH HEARINGS/
CONTD PTD PROG RPT/CAL:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DAWT/PROGPTD:07-21-22/CONTD:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU: POSITIVE REPORT,/
/PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVER MOTION/X:DEFENDANT IS RELIEVED FROM REPORTING 2XA WEEK BY PHONE & NO LONGER ON OR - MINIMUM SUPERVISION/OR/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/STWPX/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS IS GRANTED/EMTERM/CONTD:PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION MOTION/DOP/
/CAL:TO JOIN CO-DEFENDANT MATTER/X:LEO FISSEL SPECIALLY APPEARING ON BEHALFOF THE DEFENSE/DAWT/X:FUTURE DATE IS CONFIRMED/DOP/
